name: Benedict Road
description: Benedict Road is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pittsfield, MA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
hours: Sun, 8AM-Noon x 4 courts Mon, Wed, & Fri, 3-6PM

name: Berkshire Community College - Patterson Field
description: Berkshire Community College - Patterson Field is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pittsfield, MA. There are 6 courts. 2 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Berkshire Family YMCA - Pittsfield Branch
description: Come play pickleball at Berkshire Family YMCA - Pittsfield Branch in Pittsfield, MA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Berkshire South Regional Community Center
description: Berkshire South Regional Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Great Barrington, MA. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Bousquet Sport Fitness and Athletic Club
description: Bousquet Sport Fitness and Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Pittsfield, MA. There are 10 concrete and asphalt courts. 4 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include locker rooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, water, youth programming, food, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.

name: Boys & Girls Club of the Berkshires
description: Boys & Girls Club of the Berkshires is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pittsfield, MA. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Dalton Community Recreational Association
description: Come play pickleball at Dalton Community Recreational Association in Dalton, MA! There are 2 courts. 1 is indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Herberg Jr High School
description: Come play pickleball at Herberg Jr High School in Pittsfield, MA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Hope Church
description: Hope Church is a place to play pickleball in Lenox, MA. There are 2 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.

name: Monument Mountain Regional High School
description: Monument Mountain Regional High School is a place to play pickleball in Great Barrington, MA. There are 7 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Pittsfield Y
description: Come play pickleball at Pittsfield Y in Pontoosuc, MA!
